sources.title: Long Shot, The
sources.description: You can find more information regarding this film on its IMDb page .

metadata.Plot: Henry Sharon is about to be ruined financially by rival stable owner Lew Ralston when he gets an idea to fake his own death. His prize horse Certified Check is bequeathed to niece Martha, a young woman Ralston had hoped to marry.
metadata.Writer: Ewart Adamson, Harry Beresford, George Callahan
metadata.Actors: Gordon Jones, Marsha Hunt, C. Henry Gordon
